**Logic (Conditionals).**

**Abstract.**

**Conditional Functions** utilise a standard functional Nashorn scope-based nomenclature. They may be placed within named scopes or other logic fields for firing items such as in-game events.

**Custom Checks.**

- declareCustomCivilisationDiplomaticValueCheck(arg0\_options)  
  - base\_name: (String) \- The base function name.  
  - array\_resolve\_function: (Function) \- The resolution function that resolves the left-hand comparison value. (Parameter 1\)  
  - value\_function: (Function) \- The resolution function that resolves the right-hand comparison value. (Parameter 0\)  
- declareCustomCivilisationValueCheck(arg0\_options)  
  - base\_name: (String) \- The base function name.  
  - array\_resolve\_function: (Function) \- The resolution function that resolves the left-hand comparison value. (Parameter 1\)  
  - value\_function: (Function) \- The resolution function that resolves the right-hand comparison value. (Parameter 0\)  
- declareCustomProvinceValueCheck(arg0\_options)  
  - base\_name: (String) \- The base function name.  
  - array\_resolve\_function: (Function) \- The resolution function that resolves the left-hand comparison value. (Parameter 1\)  
  - value\_function: (Function) \- The resolution function that resolves the right-hand comparison value. (Parameter 0\)

**Meta Scope Conditions.**  
getCivilisationFlag(arg0\_civ\_tag, arg1\_flag\_key)  
getCivilisationVariable(arg0\_civ\_tag, arg1\_variable\_key)  
getProvinceFlag(arg0\_province, arg1\_flag\_key)  
getProvinceVariable(arg0\_province, arg1\_variable\_key)

**Gamestate Scope Conditions.**

1. **Global Scope Conditions.**  
     
   **Meta.**  
   Civilisation.  
- anyCivilisationDoesNotExist(arg0\_civ\_tags)  
- anyCivilisationExists(arg0\_civ\_tags)  
- civilisationDoesNotExist(arg0\_civ\_tags)  
- civilisationExists(arg0\_civ\_tags)  
    
  Time.  
- dateIs(arg0\_date\_string) \- DD.MM.YYYY format.  
- dateIsGEQ(arg0\_date\_string)  
- dateIsGreaterThan(arg0\_date\_string)  
- dateIsLEQ(arg0\_date\_string)  
- dateIsLessThan(arg0\_date\_string)  
- hourIs(arg0\_number)  
- hourIsGEQ(arg0\_number)  
- hourIsGreaterThan(arg0\_number)  
- hourIsLEQ(arg0\_number)  
- hourIsLessThan(arg0\_number)  
    
1. **International Organisation Scope Conditions.**  
2. **Resource Scope Conditions. WIP.**

- resourceIs(arg0\_resource\_names, arg1\_resource\_names)  
- resourceIsNot(arg0\_resource\_names, arg1\_resource\_names)

  **Military.**  
- provinceArmyIs(arg0\_provinces, arg1\_options)  
  - tag: (String, CivTag)  
      
  - has\_general: (FilePath.JSON) \- Optional. The required general to be in the province. Not required by default.  
  - value: (Number) \- The required strength of the army in the province.  
- provinceHasArmy(arg0\_provinces)  
- provinceHasArmyFrom(arg0\_provinces, arg1\_civ\_tags)
